name: e2e-dag-topology
description: Explicit DAG launches independent roots first, then a dependent join with dependency context.

tasks.task: Reply exactly DAG_ROOT_A_TOKEN and do not inspect or modify files.
Reply exactly DAG_ROOT_B_TOKEN and do not inspect or modify files.

If the DAG Dependency Context lists dag-root-a and dag-root-b with status completed and includes both DAG_ROOT_A_TOKEN and DAG_ROOT_B_TOKEN in output previews, reply exactly E2E_DAG_JOIN_OK. Otherwise reply exactly E2E_DAG_JOIN_MISSING. Do not inspect or modify files.
